project.name: Cove Blades
project.description: A modern, SEO-optimized cutlery sharpening service website for Cove Blades — a mobile and drop-off cutlery sharpening business serving Vancouver and the Lower Mainland since 2020. The site replaces coveblades.com under a new brand name, retaining all existing service content, pricing, and contact information while providing a cleaner, faster, more conversion-focused experience.
project.target_audience: Home cooks, chefs, restaurants, and businesses in Metro Vancouver and Lower Mainland BC

business_details.address: 4086 Brockton Crescent, North Vancouver, BC V7G 1E6

milestone_1.name: MVP – Core Website
milestone_1.description: Full single-page marketing site with all service, pricing, and contact information. Closely emulates coveblades.com structure and content. Deployed on Vercel.

pages.name: Home
pages.description: Long-scroll landing page with all key sections: Hero, Services, How It Works, Pricing, Reviews, Mobile Service Info, Drop Off Info, About, Contact

pages.name: Mobile Service
pages.description: Dedicated page for mobile sharpening — requirements, service areas, booking CTA

pages.name: Pricing
pages.description: Full pricing table: Residential, Home Pro, Commercial, Mobile, Additional items

pages.name: Drop Off
pages.description: Drop-off instructions, location, map embed, hours, dropbox code request

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Team bio, professional development, ethics, YouTube embed

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact form (Supabase), phone, email, hours, map, payment methods

homepage_sections: Hero — headline, subheadline, 2 CTAs (Book Mobile, Get Dropbox Code)
Trust Bar — 5-star Google rating, years in business, service area
Services Grid — 6 cards (Mobile Service, Drop Box, 1-Hour Turnaround, Ceramic & Serrated, Special Events, 30-Day Guarantee)
Mobile Service Section — requirements by area, Instagram CTA
Drop Off Section — address, photo, instructions
Pricing Tables — Residential / Home Pro / Commercial / Mobile
Google Reviews Carousel — 5-star reviews from PDF
About Us — team paragraph, YouTube embed
Contact & Location — hours, map, payment methods
Footer — nav links, social icons, copyright

features.name: Booking / Contact Form
features.description: Form with name, phone, email, service type, number of items, message. Submissions saved to Supabase table.

features.name: Dropbox Code Request
features.description: Simple CTA that tel: links to 604 210 8180 with pre-filled message, or shows a modal with instructions

features.name: Mobile-Responsive Design
features.description: Fully responsive, looks excellent on iPhone and Android. Sticky call button on mobile.

features.name: SEO Optimization
features.description: Next.js metadata API for titles, descriptions, OG tags. Structured data (LocalBusiness JSON-LD). Sitemap.

features.name: Google Reviews Display
features.description: Static display of existing reviews from PDF. Grid layout with star ratings.

features.name: Instagram Feed Link
features.description: Instagram grid teaser or link to @coveblades account

subagent_jobs.job: Initialize Next.js 14 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, ESLint. Set up Supabase client. Create .env.local template. Create /docs folder structure.
Build reusable components: Navbar, Footer, HeroSection, ServiceCard, PricingTable, ReviewCard, ContactForm, TrustBar, SectionHeading
Build the full homepage (/) assembling all sections with real content from the business data
Set up Supabase table for contact submissions, Next.js API route for form POST, server action, and .env vars

milestone_2.name: Booking System + Online Payments
milestone_2.description: Online appointment booking with Calendly or custom booking flow, Stripe payment integration for upfront deposits.

milestone_3.name: Customer Portal + Loyalty
milestone_3.description: Customer accounts, order history, loyalty program, SMS/email reminders.

design.aesthetic: Premium, dark, high-contrast. Similar to coveblades.com — clean whitespace, professional typography, strong CTAs.

services.title: 1 Hour Turnaround
services.desc: Quick drop-off turnaround service. Back in action within an hour by appointment.

services.title: Ceramic & Serrated
services.desc: 3-step diamond grinding for ceramics. Diamond-infused wheel for serrated blades.

services.title: Special Events
services.desc: We bring sharpening to your market, block party, or business event.

services.title: Mobile Service
services.desc: We come to you. Minimum 5 pieces. Servicing North Shore to Chilliwack.

services.title: 30 Day Guarantee
services.desc: Blades retain edge for 30 days or we fix them at no charge.

services.title: Secure Drop Box
services.desc: 24/7 secure drop box. Next-day pickup. Text for the code.

mobile_requirements.area: Whistler, Squamish, Chilliwack & Rest of Lower Mainland

reviews.author: Erin S.
reviews.text: Friendly and efficient. My knives were picked up, sharpened and returned within 22 hours. I highly recommend Cove Blades.

reviews.author: Brad W.
reviews.text: Dropped off a custom fillet knife and an old Bruks axe — both in dire need of blade repair and sharpening. They did an amazing job. Couldn't be more satisfied with the price and quality of the workmanship.

reviews.author: David C.
reviews.text: They dropped by our place, picked up the knives and returned them sharp as promised, within a couple of days. Highly recommended. Will use again for sure.

reviews.author: Steve M.
reviews.text: Excellent experience, beautifully sharpened and ready before promised! Will use and refer always!

reviews.author: Lana Joyce
reviews.text: It was so convenient that Cove Blades came to me, and returned all knives sharp enough to slice hair!

reviews.author: Keith Labrecque
reviews.text: Erik was able to bring my kitchen knives back like new sharpness, or maybe even better than brand new.

reviews.author: Malae Blakeley
reviews.text: Excellent service, quick turnaround; don't have to go into Vancouver. A north shore gem!

reviews.author: Peter Teevan
reviews.text: Very happy with my first visit to Cove Blades! I felt nervous about the lock-box drop off but it worked perfectly.
